top_signals.title: Willow Wealth CEO on Responsibly Growing Private Markets
top_signals.summary: Mitchell Caplan, CEO of Willow Wealth, discusses the evolving landscape of private market investing for individual investors. Caplan highlighted the trend of companies staying private longer, which has shifted significant wealth creation to the private phase before IPOs, citing examples like SpaceX and other mature private companies. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Activist Donerail Urges Beazer Homes to Engage With Suitors
top_signals.summary: Activist investor Donerail Group is urging the board of Beazer Homes USA Inc. to engage with potential buyers after rival homebuilder Dream Finders Homes Inc. boosted its takeover offer this week.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
